title: cleisostoma teres
intro: Cleisostoma teres is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, white, and star-shaped flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma teres include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of fever and headache. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
